channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-29
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: The EBA updates list of correlated currencies
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today the 2026 update of the list of closely correlated currencies, which is used for the calculation of capital requirements for foreign exchange risk under the standardised approach. The update has been carried out in line with the methodology and procedure set out in the applicable Implementing Technical Standards (ITS). The revised list has been submitted to the European Commission for endorsement. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.

item.title: BNP Paribas Fortis cède 25% de sa participation à Ageas dans AG Insurance pour 1,9 Md€ - La Tribune de l'Assurance

item.title: Press release - Parliament endorses renewed EU trade instrument for development
item.description: On Tuesday, Parliament adopted the renewed regulation on the generalised system of preferences (GSP). Committee on International Trade Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact réglementaire.
